title: The Enron Investigation Brief
short_description: Given Enron Email Dataset, build an evidence-backed page for synthesis.
long_description: This task tests context engineering strategies on Enron Email Dataset with evidence citation, temporal reasoning, and uncertainty handling.
benchmark_question: What warning signs, coordination patterns, or internal tensions were visible before the collapse, and what evidence supports those conclusions?

required_sections: Documents or Messages That Mattered Most

safety.privacy_risks: personal or sensitive text may appear in source data
safety.legal_risks: avoid unsupported accusations and license violations
safety.recommended_mitigations: cite evidence, show limitations, sample responsibly

title: Brazil Public Money Trail
short_description: Trace a Brazilian public policy theme from legislative activity to federal public spending with evidence-backed civic analysis.
long_description: This civic accountability task tests whether context engineering strategies can connect fragmented public data across Câmara dos Deputados, Portal da Transparência, and optional TCU sources while separating verified facts from hypotheses.
benchmark_question: Trace one Brazilian public policy theme from legislative activity to federal public spending. What can be verified, which actors and agencies appear, what changed over time, and what questions remain open?
corpus_size: multi-source legislative and spending records; sample mode is small, full mode can span years of APIs

dataset.name: Brazilian legislative and federal public spending data
dataset.license: See data_manifest.yaml; use only official public records and document source terms.
dataset.access_method: scripted download with sample mode, API caching, optional Portal da Transparência token, optional TCU enrichment

safety.privacy_risks: Public official records may include personal or entity identifiers; display only relevant public data and avoid unnecessary exposure.
safety.legal_risks: Do not imply corruption, illegal conduct, or improper influence without direct authoritative evidence.
safety.recommended_mitigations: Separate fact from inference, cite official sources, label weak links, document missing data and API coverage limitations.

title: Open Source Ecosystem Radar
short_description: Given GH Archive, build an evidence-backed page for synthesis.
long_description: This task tests context engineering strategies on GH Archive with evidence citation, temporal reasoning, and uncertainty handling.
benchmark_question: Which open-source repositories or ecosystems show unusual growth, decline, concentration risk, or emerging momentum in the selected time window?

safety.privacy_risks: personal or sensitive text may appear in source data
safety.legal_risks: avoid unsupported accusations and license violations
safety.recommended_mitigations: cite evidence, show limitations, sample responsibly
